data.title: Ramaco Resources declares $0.1971 dividend
data.description:
• Ramaco Resources (NASDAQ:METCB) declares $0.1971/share quarterly dividend.
  • Forward yield 8.79%
  • Payable March 14; for shareholders of record Feb. 28; ex-div Feb. 28.
  • See METCB Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Wingstop reports mixed Q4 earnings; initiates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Wingstop press release (NASDAQ:WING): Q4 GAAP EPS of $0.92 beats by $0.05.
  • Revenue of $161.8M (+27.3% Y/Y) misses by $2.78M.
  • System-wide sales increased 27.6% to $1.2 billion
  • 105 net new openings in the fiscal fourth quarter 2024
  • Domestic restaurant AUV increased to $2.1 million
  • Domestic same store sales increased 10.1%
  • Digital sales increased to 70.3% of system-wide sales
  • Adjusted EBITDA, a non-GAAP measure, increased 44.2% to $56.3 million

  • Financial Outlook

    The Company expects the following for fiscal year 2025:

    • Low- to mid-single digit domestic same store sales growth;
    • Global unit growth rate of 14% to 15%;
    • SG&A of approximately $140 million, which includes system implementation costs of approximately $4.5 million;
    • Stock-based compensation expense of approximately $26 million;
    • Interest expense, net of approximately $46 million; and
    • Depreciation and amortization of between $29 - $30 million.

data.title: Diversified Energy to launch 8.5M-share public offering
data.description:
Diversified Energy (OTCQX:DEC) -4.4% pre-market Wednesday after saying it launched a U.S. public offering of as much as 8.5M common shares, with an underwriters option to purchase up to an additional 850K shares at the public offering price.

The company plans to use the net proceeds to repay part of the debt expected to be incurred in connection with the proposed acquisition of Maverick Natural Resources.

Last month, Diversified Energy (OTCQX:DEC) announced the acquisition of Maverick Natural Resources for $1.275B including debt, expanding the company into the Permian Basin.

The two companies' "combined footprint in Oklahoma and the Western Anadarko Basin creates one of the largest in terms of production and acreage, which includes the emerging Cherokee formation," Diversified (OTCQX:DEC) CEO Rusty Hutson said.

data.title: HPQ Silicon announces patent for lithium-ion battery cathode material
data.description:
• HPQ Silicon (TSXV:HPQ:CA) has filed a provisional patent for a one-step manufacturing process that produces fumed alumina and fumed titanium, essential for the advancement of next-generation lithium-ion battery cathodes.
  • This patent allows HPQ to broaden its offering in both anode and cathode material production.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: X4 Pharmaceuticals partners with taiba rare for distribution of XOLREMDI drug
data.description:
• X4 Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:XFOR) and taiba rare have entered into an exclusive agreement for the distribution and commercialization of XOLREMDI® (mavorixafor), an oral treatment for WHIM syndrome in select Middle East countries.
  • taiba will lead the distribution, promotion, marketing, and sales of XOLREMDI within the territory, working jointly with X4 on key strategic decisions.
  • XOLREMDI (mavorixafor) was approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration in April 2024 for the treatment of patients 12 years of age and older with WHIM syndrome.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: BTQ Technologies files to list shares on Nasdaq
data.description:
• BTQ Technologies (NEOE:BTQ:CA) has filed an application to list its common shares on Nasdaq Capital Market.
  • The company will continue to maintain the listing of its common shares on the CBOE Canada exchange.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: KWESST Micro Systems looks to raise C$3.5 million in private placement
data.description:
• KWESST Micro Systems (TSXV:KWE:CA) said it will issue and sell its shares to raise C$3.5 million in a private placement.
  • The firm expects to issue 3.79M shares and/or pre-funded warrants to acquire one share at a price of C$0.928 apiece.
  • Each share or pre-funded warrant is bundled with one common share purchase warrant, and each warrant is immediately exercisable and entitles the holder to acquire one share at an exercise price of C$1.16 apiece.
  • The firm expects to use the net proceeds for general working capital purposes.

data.title: BWX Technologies wins $2.1B in contracts for U.S. Naval nuclear reactor components
data.description:
BWX Technologies (NYSE:BWXT) +2.5% pre-market Wednesday after announcing ~$2.1B in contract awards for the manufacture of reactor components for the U.S. Naval Nuclear Propulsion Program.

BWXT (NYSE:BWXT) said nuclear reactor component manufacturing and material procurement activities for Columbia and Virginia class submarines, as well as Ford class aircraft carriers, will be performed at its operations sites in Virginia, Ohio and Indiana over seven years.

Additionally, production and delivery of fuel and support activities for the U.S. Naval Nuclear Propulsion Program are performed by Nuclear Fuel Services Inc. in Tennessee; the contract, valued at $300M, was awarded and announced in October 2023, with work scheduled for completion this year.

data.title: Earnings Snapshot: Analog Devices tops FQ1 estimates; initiates FQ2 outlook
Gibraltar reports mixed Q4 earnings; initiates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Gibraltar press release (NASDAQ:ROCK): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $1.01 beats by $0.10.
  • Revenue of $302.1M (-8.1% Y/Y) misses by $5.83M.
  • Strong 2024 Cash Generation of $174 Million.
  • Expands Agtech’s Structures Business with Acquisition of Lane Supply.
  • 2025 Guidance: Net Sales $1.40B – $1.45B vs. $1.40B consensus, GAAP EPS $4.25 - $4.50, Adjusted EPS $4.80 - $5.05 vs. $4.74 consensus.
